article_items.title: AI in Warehousing: Akash Gupta's vision for the future
article_items.description: Explore how GreyOrange's software revolutionizes warehouse automation with AI, transforming logistics into dynamic, predictive ecosystems.
article_items.excerpt: Explore how GreyOrange's software revolutionizes warehouse automation with AI, transforming logistics into dynamic, predictive ecosystems.
article_items.summary: Daimon Robotics and Galbot jointly launches RobOmni for benchmarking tactile perception and dexterous manipulation GENISOM AI debuts deployable robotics platforms at ICRA 2026 GMSL and the growing ecosystem around robotic vision systems Search The Robot Report AI in warehousing: Akash Gupta’s vision for the future Episode 247 of The Robot Report Podcast features the CEO of GreyOrange. Podcast guest: Akash Gupta of GreyOrange Akash Gupta is the CEO of GreyOrange, where he leads the company ‘s global strategy and culture of innovation at the intersection of AI, software, and robotics. Since co-founding GreyOrange in 2012, he has helped build the company into a global leader in AI-powered fulfillment orchestration, serving some of the world’s largest retailers and logistics providers. Oitzman is a robotics industry veteran with 25-plus years of experience at various high-tech companies in the roles of marketing, sales and product management.

Akash was recognized in MIT Technology Review ‘s “35 Innovators Under 35” and has mentored entrepreneurs and technology leaders at more than 25 institutions worldwide, including Stanford, MIT, and the Indian institutes.

Since co-founding GreyOrange in 2012, he has helped build the company into a global leader in AI-powered fulfillment orchestration, serving some of the world’s largest retailers and logistics providers.
GreyMatter works with the robots you already have, or with the ones you want.
Contact Mike Oitzman – moitzman@wtwhmedia.com Mike Oitzman is Senior Editor of WTWH's Robotics Group and founder of the Mobile Robot Guide.

GreyMatter by GreyOrange is the AI-powered warehouse orchestration platform that coordinates every agent on your floor in real time, with over a million optimizations per minute, and delivering up to 4x productivity.
Explore how GreyOrange's software revolutionizes warehouse automation with AI, transforming logistics into dynamic, predictive ecosystems.

article_items.title: Mistral is rumored to be raising €3B at €20B valuation | TechCrunch
article_items.description: The funding round would value the company at around €20 billion (about $23.15 billion), nearly double its Series C valuation of €11.7 billion.
